config.target_policy: DWM qpcVBlank target when valid; fixed-horizon baselines use poll elapsed time + horizon.
config.ground_truth_policy: Linear interpolation between adjacent referencePoll samples at target elapsed timestamp.
config.hook_poll_disagreement_policy: Distance from product poll cursor position to most recent hook sample position.
config.stop_window_policy: Reference stream transition from >=250 px/s motion to <=20 px/s within 30 ms.
